perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man in a blue striped shirt is seated in a white chair, gesturing broadly with his hands and laughing while looking toward the camera. A small green potted plant is visible behind him. (2) A woman in a striped shirt and denim shorts sits next to him, holding a whiteboard and pen, pointing and gesturing as she speaks. (3) A third man in a beige jacket enters the frame from the side, playfully swinging a black foam tube at the first man while they all laugh and interact around a white table.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Enthusiastic male voice speaking Mandarin at a fast pace. (A) Vocals: Male, high-energy and laughing. (B) BGM: Upbeat, rhythmic electronic track. (C) Ambient: Studio quiet. (D) SFX: None. (2) Overlapping voices of a man and a woman in a spirited debate. (A) Vocals: Male and female, humorous tone. (B) BGM: Continuous upbeat rhythm. (C) Ambient: Studio. (D) SFX: Added canned laughter tracks. (3) Sound of a light impact as a foam stick hits a surface, followed by a chorus of laughter. (A) Vocals: Three distinct voices laughing. (B) BGM: Fades out towards the end. (C) Ambient: Studio. (D) SFX: A 'boing' sound effect.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles at the bottom translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large variety-show style captions like '我解釋' (I explain) and '寶貝早安沒有回' (Baby good morning, no reply) appear in bold yellow and white. (3) Decorative Text: On-screen graphics depicting text message bubbles with '09:00' and '22:00' timestamps appear to represent automated messages.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro discussion -> Comedic explanation of a situation -> Mocking demonstration with physical humor

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male in blue striped shirt, 1 female in black and white striped shirt, 1 male in beige jacket.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The primary speaker is a male with short hair wearing a blue vertical-striped shirt and black shorts. The female has hair tied back and wears a striped long-sleeve shirt. The second male wears a beige utility jacket.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean indoor studio with a white curtain backdrop, a small green plant, a white table, and a fireplace-style mantelpiece decoration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Narrative Setup -> Teasing Conflict -> Comedic Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to entertain through a humorous discussion about the use of automated 'canned' messages in a romantic relationship. The creators mock the lack of sincerity in sending pre-programmed greetings and check-ins at specific times, using a mix of storytelling and physical comedy to engage the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: No specific product brand or service is being promoted; the focus is on a comedic lifestyle story.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of colorful Traditional Chinese variety-show text overlays and high-pitched comedic vocal reactions typical of Taiwanese YouTubers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast-paced editing and beat-synced sound effects suggest this is part of a high-engagement social media comedy series.
